video_frame_stats_t(3) Library Functions Manual video_frame_stats_t(3)

NAME

video_frame_stats_t - Frame statistics structure.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/video/rgba/video_frame.h>

Data Fields


uint64_t total_frames
Total frames received since creation. uint64_t dropped_frames
Total frames dropped (due to buffer full or errors). float drop_rate
Frame drop rate (dropped_frames / total_frames, 0.0-1.0). uint64_t avg_decode_time_ns
Average frame decode time in nanoseconds. uint64_t avg_render_time_ns
Average frame render time in nanoseconds.

Detailed Description

Frame statistics structure.

Contains aggregated statistics for video frame quality monitoring. Used for adaptive streaming quality control based on performance metrics.

Definition at line 235 of file video_frame.h.

Field Documentation

uint64_t video_frame_stats_t::avg_decode_time_ns

Average frame decode time in nanoseconds.

Average frame render time in nanoseconds.

float video_frame_stats_t::drop_rate

Frame drop rate (dropped_frames / total_frames, 0.0-1.0).

uint64_t video_frame_stats_t::dropped_frames

Total frames dropped (due to buffer full or errors).

uint64_t video_frame_stats_t::total_frames

Total frames received since creation.
